dag.description: SOPA (Standard Operating Procedure Automation) instruction tuning singleton pipeline. Single-node DAG for fine-tuning a Bedrock LLM on domain-specific SOP instructions.

agent_context.when_to_use: Fine-tune a Bedrock LLM on domain-specific standard operating procedures for automated decision-making. Single-step pipeline without traditional ML calibration or registration.
agent_context.when_not_to_use: If you need classification output (use PyTorch/XGBoost). If zero-shot prompting suffices. If you need calibration/registration (use bedrock_pytorch_e2e variants).

prerequisites.how: Account has foundation model access for customization

common_pitfalls: Dataset format must match Bedrock fine-tuning API requirements
No registration step - model accessed via custom endpoint
Very high cost - validate dataset quality first
